ai.welcome_msg: Hi! Main Amy hoon 💜 aapki AI parenting coach. Mujhse kuch bhi poochein — neend, gussa, nakhre, school ki chintayein. Main yahaan hoon.
ai.quota_remaining: {{limit}} mein se {{remaining}} free Amy AI messages baaki hain
ai.quota_remaining_singular: {{limit}} mein se {{remaining}} free Amy AI message baaki hai
ai.quota_exhausted: Free Amy AI limit khatam ho gayi
ai.quota_exhausted_go_premium: Free Amy AI limit khatam — premium lein
ai.quota_exhausted_upgrade: Free Amy AI limit khatam — unlimited messages ke liye upgrade karein.
ai.quota_exhausted_body: Aapne apne {{limit}} free Amy AI messages use kar liye hain. Unlimited sawalon, gehri jaankari aur priority support ke liye Premium mein upgrade karein.
ai.quota_exhausted_input: Saare {{limit}} free messages use ho gaye. Unlimited sawalon ke liye Premium mein upgrade karein.
ai.subtitle: Hi 😊 Main Amy hoon — parenting ke baare mein kuch bhi poochein, main yahaan hoon ❤️
ai.empty_heading: Hi 😊 Main Amy hoon, aapki parenting co-pilot
ai.empty_body: Chinta mat karein, main yahaan help ke liye hoon ❤️ Neend, khaana, behavior, school anxiety, screen time — kuch bhi poochein.
ai.suggested_q1: Mera bachha sabziyan nahi khata — main kya karoon?
ai.suggested_q2: Behtar sone ka routine kaise banayein?
ai.suggested_q3: Mere 7 saal ke bachhe ko gussa aata hai — kya yeh normal hai?
ai.suggested_q4: Bachhe ko zyada padhne ke liye kaise encourage karein?
ai.suggested_q5: 5 saal ke bachhe ke liye kitna screen time theek hai?
ai.suggested_q6: Mera bachha school jaane se darta hai — main kaise help karoon?
ai.disclaimer: Amy AI · medical concerns ke liye hamesha kisi expert se milein
ai.input_placeholder: Neend, gussa, khaana, school anxiety ke baare mein poochein...
ai.send_hint: Bhejne ke liye Enter dabayein · Nayi line ke liye Shift+Enter
ai.error_response: Jawab nahi mila. Kripya phir try karein.

landing.hero_headline: Jahaan Smart Parenting Shuru Hoti Hai
landing.hero_sub: AmyNest AI minutes mein aapke bachhe ke liye personalized, research-backed parenting plan banati hai — child psychology pe based, random tips pe nahi.
landing.hero_free: ✨ Shuru karna free · Koi credit card zaruri nahi
landing.problems_heading: Abhi bhi akele sab figure out kar rahe hain?
landing.problems_sub: Har parent inka saamna karte hain. Amy Coach aapko personalized, research-backed step-by-step plan deti hai — generic tips nahi.
landing.not_alone: Aap akele nahi hain — AmyNest ke 87% parents 2 hafte mein calmer mornings report karte hain.
landing.features_heading: Asli Child Science pe Bane Tools
landing.features_sub: Ek platform — har feature AAP guidelines, developmental psychology aur behavioral science pe grounded.
landing.coach_title: Amy Coach — Asli Parenting Challenges Solve Karein
landing.coach_desc: Nakhron se screen time tak, neend se dhyaan tak — Amy Coach aapko Dr. Ross Greene ke CPS model, Dr. Carol Dweck ke growth mindset framework aur AAP guidelines pe based 12-step plans deti hai. Koi generic advice nahi — sirf woh jo aapke bachhe ke liye kaam karta hai.
landing.highlight_1: Aapke bachhe ki profile pe based personalized plans
landing.highlight_4: Solve hone tak Amy ka continuous guidance
landing.feature_routine_desc: Structured routines jo habit loop theory pe based hain — aapke bachhe ke brain ko lasting habits ke liye ready karti hain.
landing.feature_hub_desc: Expert articles, daily tips aur Amy AI guidance — top child development research se curated.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Kuch bhi poochein, research-grounded jawab turant paayein. Jaise aapki pocket mein ek child psychologist ho.
landing.mid_cta: Amy Coach free try karein — 3 minutes se kam mein aapka pehla personalized plan.
landing.how_eyebrow: Minutes mein Apna Pehla Plan Paayein
landing.how_sub: Teen steps mein aapke bachhe ke liye science-backed plan.
landing.step1_desc: Woh parenting problem chunein jise aap solve karna chahte hain — nakhre, neend, screen time, dhyaan, aur bahut kuch.
landing.step2_title: Amy ko apne bachhe ke baare mein batayein
landing.step2_desc: Umar, personality aur habits — Amy iska use aapke bachhe ki specific profile ke liye plan calibrate karne mein karti hai.
landing.step3_desc: 12-step, science-backed plan paayein jise aap aaj shuru kar sakte hain — proven behavioral frameworks pe banaya gaya.
landing.trust_sub: AmyNest 30+ peer-reviewed frameworks pe bana hai — opinions pe nahi. Real science, real results.
landing.trust1_desc: Har routine Cue → Routine → Reward ke around design ki gayi hai. Bachhe lasting habits banate hain — sirf temporary behavior changes nahi.
landing.trust2_desc: Amy outcome se zyada effort ko reward karti hai — Stanford research se proven ki yeh bachhon mein long-term success build karta hai.
landing.trust3_desc: Screen time, sleep schedules aur developmental milestones — sab American Academy of Pediatrics aur CDC guidelines ke according calibrated.
landing.final_cta_heading: Aapke bachhe ko ek plan ki zarurat hai jo waqai kaam kare.
landing.final_cta_sub: 12,000+ families se judein jo research-backed parenting plans se calm, smart, zyada confident bachhe pal rahe hain — bilkul free.
landing.footer_tagline: Jahaan Smart Parenting Shuru Hoti Hai

delete_account.title: Apna Account Delete Karein
delete_account.subtitle: Aapko jaate dekh dukh hua. Neeche diye gaye steps follow karke aap apna AmyNest account aur saara data permanently delete kar sakte hain.
delete_account.warning_body: Ek baar delete hone ke baad, aapka account aur saara data wapas nahi mil sakta. Aage badhne se pehle confirm zaroor karein.
data_items: Sabhi bachhon ki profiles aur umr
delete_account.retention_after: ke andar data permanently delete ho jata hai. Anonymous, combined analytics (jo aapke account se linked nahi hain) rakhe ja sakte hain.

steps.title: AmyNest App kholein
steps.description: Apne Android ya iOS device par AmyNest app launch karein.

steps.title: Settings mein jaayein
steps.description: Apni profile picture ya menu icon par tap karein, fir "Settings" chunein.

steps.title: "Delete Account" par tap karein
steps.description: Neeche scroll karein aur "Delete Account" par tap karein. Pooche jaane par confirm karein.

steps.title: Account Delete Ho Gaya
steps.description: Aapka account aur saara related data 30 din ke andar permanently delete ho jayega.

delete_account.help_body: Agar aap app tak nahi pahunch pa rahe ya account delete karne mein madad chahiye, to humari support team se contact karein — hum 7 working days ke andar aapka request manually process karenge.
delete_account.help_footnote: Kripya apne message mein apne AmyNest account se juda email ya phone number zaroor likhein.

kids_control_center.title: 👶 Kids Control Center
kids_control_center.hero_title: Parents ke liye Smart Control, Bachhon ke liye Safe Experience
kids_control_center.hero_sub: Apne bachhe ki routine, learning, aur screen time ko aasani se guide karein.
kids_control_center.kids_section_body: AmyNest Kids bachhon ke liye ek safe aur guided environment hai jo parent app ke saath sync hota hai. Bachhe sirf apni routines, activities, aur rewards dekhte hain, jabki parents background mein sab kuch manage karte hain.

study.no_children_title: Abhi tak koi children add nahi kiye gaye
study.no_children_body: Smart Study Zone use karna shuru karne ke liye ek child Profile add karein.
study.goal_toast_body: Aapne aaj ka study target zabardast tareeke se poora kiya.
study.perfect_toast_body: {{topic}} bina kisi galti ke clear hua.

onboarding.intro_greeting: Hi {{name}}! 👋 Main Amy hoon, aapki parenting coach. Chaliye jaldi se aapka Profile set up karte hain — isme lagbhag 2 minute lagenge!
onboarding.intro_start: Chaliye aapke bachche se shuru karte hain. Aapke bachche ka naam kya hai?
onboarding.saving_message: Perfect! Ab aapka Profile save kiya ja raha hai... 💾
onboarding.setting_up: Aapka Profile set up ho raha hai
onboarding.child_name_reply: Achha naam hai! 😊 {{name}} ki date of birth kab hai?
onboarding.infant_dob_reply:
{{name}} abhi baby hai — kitna pyaara! 🍼

Is umar mein har bachcha alag hota hai — hum flexible routines ke hisaab se learning adapt karenge.

Abhi {{name}} ko kaise feed kiya ja raha hai? (optional, aap Skip kar sakte hain)
onboarding.school_question: Kya {{name}} abhi school ja raha/rahi hai? 🏫
onboarding.feeding_reply: Samajh gaya! 😊 Aap {{name}} ke sleep pattern ko kaise describe karenge?
onboarding.skip_sleep_reply: Koi baat nahi! Aap {{name}} ke sleep pattern ko kaise describe karenge?
onboarding.skip_later: Skip — main ise baad mein add karunga/karungi
onboarding.child_added_first: Perfect! {{name}} ka Profile ready hai. 🎉 Kya aap ek aur bachcha add karna chahenge?
onboarding.child_added_more: Kya aap ek aur bachcha add karna chahenge?
onboarding.wake_question: {{name}} aam taur par kis time uthta/uthti hai? ☀️
onboarding.school_start_question: {{name}} ka school kis time shuru hota hai?
onboarding.school_end_question: Aur school kis time khatam hota hai?
onboarding.child_added_first_school: Samajh gaya! Kya aap ek aur bachcha bhi add karna chahenge? 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
onboarding.next_child_name: Agale bachche ka naam kya hai?
onboarding.parent_intro: Badhiya! Ab apne baare mein thoda batayein. Aapka naam kya hai? 😊
onboarding.parent_name_reply: Aapse milkar achha laga, {{name}}! 🙏 Bachche ke saath aapka role kya hai?
onboarding.work_question: Aap kis tarah ka kaam karte hain?
onboarding.region_question: Bas kuch last cheezein taaki Amy AI aapki family ke liye aur smart ban sake. Main kis regional cuisine ke hisaab se meals plan karun? 🍛
onboarding.mobile_question: Samajh gaya! 📱 Kaunsa mobile number hai jahan Amy reminders bhej sakti hai? (Aap ise abhi ke liye Skip kar sakte hain.)
onboarding.allergies_question: Badhiya! 🌾 Koi food allergies ya meals mein kuch aisa jo avoid karna ho? (Type karein ya agar kuch nahi hai to Skip karein.)
onboarding.allergies_skip: Koi baat nahi! 🌾 Koi food allergies ya meals mein kuch aisa jo avoid karna ho? (Type karein ya agar kuch nahi hai to Skip karein.)
onboarding.no_allergies_button: Koi allergies nahi — setup finish karein
onboarding.saving_title: Amy set up kar rahi hai
onboarding.edit_anytime_title: Aap ye details kabhi bhi edit kar sakte hain
onboarding.edit_anytime_body_after: section mein menu se, taaki aap bachche ki info, timings, food preferences, aur aur bhi cheezein update kar sakein.
onboarding.notif_title: Reminders ke saath Track par bane rahiye
onboarding.notif_subtitle: Amy aapko routines, bedtime, aur meals ke baare mein bilkul sahi time par, har din remind kar sakti hai.
onboarding.notif_benefit_routines: Routine reminders taaki kuch bhi miss na ho
onboarding.notif_benefit_bedtime: Shaant night routine ke liye bedtime alerts
onboarding.notif_benefit_meals: Aapke bachche ke liye meal time nudges
onboarding.notif_skip: Shayad baad mein — Dashboard par jayein
